title: helichrysum humbertii
intro: Helichrysum humbertii, also known as the giant yellow everlasting or giant yellow daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial actions, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant. Helichrysum humbertii can be prepared in herbal teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate specific health issues.
